title: poa nemoralis var. debilis
intro: Poa nemoralis var. debilis, also known as the slender wood meadow-grass or debilitated meadow grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is a perennial grass that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. Poa nemoralis var. debilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
